name: @valve-tech/unchained-reader
description: Browser-safe, zero-dependency reader for the TrueBlocks Unchained Index. Resolves the index manifest, fetches bloom filters and index chunks from any IPFS gateway, and parses the binary bloom/chunk formats client-side into address appearances — no chifra daemon, no backend, no API key. Pairs with @valve-tech/trueblocks-sdk (which talks to a running daemon); this package reads the published index directly. Part of the valve-tech/evm-toolkit synchronized release line.
